expectations.text: Produces plans across multiple phases that can execute in parallel
expectations.evidence: All 4 plans are within a single phase (01-multi-tenant-foundation-auth). No cross-phase parallelism possible.

expectations.text: Phase 1 and Phase 2 plans have zero file overlap
expectations.evidence: Only one phase exists. No Phase 2 to compare with. All plans write to the same src/ tree.

expectations.text: Correctly excludes SSO from Sprint 1 scope
expectations.evidence: Plan 01-04 implements SAML SSO (Wave 3). SSO is included in the phase scope because the old roadmap bundled R2 (all auth including SAML) into Phase 1.

expectations.text: Higher max parallelism than old skill
expectations.evidence: Max 2 agents at any point (Wave 2: Plans 02+03 in parallel). Wave 1 and Wave 3 are single-plan waves.

expectations.text: Plans have complete task anatomy (files, action, verify, done)
expectations.evidence: All 4 plans have properly structured tasks with all four required fields.
